shortDescription: "The unqualified names of different classes must be different"
concepts:

  - Class

# - id: LiteralNoExpression

inOtherPl:
# - pl: JavaScript
#   id: UnqualifiedNamesMustDiffer

plVersion:
# from: jls8
# to: jls14

There cannot be two classes with the same unqualified name (e.g., two classes called `OutputStream`).

frontmatter.shortDescription: The unqualified names of different classes must be different
